2605.22205.title: Skill Weaving: Efficient LLM Improvement via Modular Skillpacks
2605.22205.paper_summary: Large language models increasingly require specialization across diverse domains, yet existing approaches struggle to balance multi-domain capacities with strict memory and inference constraints. In this work, we introduce SkillWeave, a modular improvement framework that enables LLMs to specialize under fixed memory budgets. SkillWeave partitions full capabilities of a general-purpose model into skillpacks -- lightweight, domain-specific delta modules -- that reorganize and refine the model's internal knowledge. For efficient deployment, SkillWeave integrates SkillZip to compress skillpacks into compact and inference-ready format, enabling strong multi-domain performance with low-latency execution. On multi-task and agentic benchmarks, a 9B SkillWeave model outperforms several baselines and even surpasses a 32B monolithic LLM, while achieving up to 4x speedup.
2605.22205.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型越來越需要在多樣化領域中專業化，但現有的方法在平衡多領域能力與嚴格的記憶和推理限制方面面臨挑戰。在這項工作中，我們介紹了SkillWeave，一個模組化的改進框架，使LLM能夠在固定的記憶預算下專業化。SkillWeave將通用模型的完整能力劃分為技能包——輕量級的特定領域增量模組——這些模組重新組織和精煉模型的內部知識。為了高效部署，SkillWeave整合了SkillZip，將技能包壓縮為緊湊且準備好推理的格式，從而實現強大的多領域性能和低延遲執行。在多任務和代理基準測試中，一個9B的SkillWeave模型超越了幾個基準，甚至超過了一個32B的單體LLM，同時實現了高達4倍的加速。
2605.22205.author: Zhuo Li et.al.
2605.22205.authors: Zhuo Li, Guodong Du, Zesheng Shi, Weiyang Guo, Weijun Yao, Yuan Zhou, Jiabo Zhang, Jing Li
